title: Junior Instructional Designer at American Institute Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at American Institute Global Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at American Institute Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About American Institute Global Group:
American Institute Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute Global Group!
